description: Non-localized Major Arcana card data for the Arcana Signature feature. These are the 13 birthday-reachable (personality, soul) combinations: personality values 10-22 reduce to a single-digit soul card. Localized theme/reflection text lives in source/<locale>/personalized_readings/arcana_signature.json keyed by the same ids. 'cards' lists the two visible cards in pair-key order; Flutter matches a reading by the unordered set of the two visible card ids. 'bridgeCards' (Sun signature only) is the traditional 19->10->1 middle card, surfaced as a calculation/bridge note only, never a third position.
